en: Drempt is the only English word that ends in M-T. Almonds are part of the peach family.
Maine is the sole state with a one-syllable name. There are just four Doe's words,
tremendous, horrendous, stupendous, and hazardous. Los Angeles' full name is a mouthful.
A cat has 32 muscles in each ear. An ostrich's eye is bigger than its brain.
Tigers have striped skin, not just fur. Watch ads often show 10-10.
Bert and Ernie from Sesame Street have interesting origins.
So much to learn in just 20 seconds.
